prevalence.trend: increasing due to urbanization and stress

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 GAD: excessive worry for ≥6 months with associated symptoms and functional impairment

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Adapted DSM-5/ICD-11 with cultural considerations for somatic symptoms
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) and SSRIs; National Mental Health Programme guidelines
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High stigma, shortage of mental health professionals (0.75 per 100,000), rural-urban disparities, 80-90% treatment gap
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Expanding telepsychiatry, NMHP initiatives, growing awareness post-COVID
